output:
# Synopsys / ANSYS M&A Deal Terms

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Target (legal entity)** | ANSYS, Inc. (a Delaware corporation) | Cover page / Notice of Special Meeting |
| **Acquirer (legal entity)** | Synopsys, Inc. (a Delaware corporation); merger vehicle: ALTA Acquisition Corp. (wholly owned subsidiary of Synopsys) | Cover page / Notice of Special Meeting |
| **Announcement date** | January 15, 2024 (date of merger agreement signing) | Notice of Special Meeting; "On January 15, 2024…" |
| **Closing date (or expected closing)** | Expected to be completed in the first half of 2024 (document truncated before full closing date language; special meeting scheduled May 22, 2024) | Conditions to Completion section; Special Meeting Notice |
| **Total enterprise value (EV)** | NOT STATED (implied EV not explicitly disclosed in the extracted portion) | — |
| **Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value)** | Mixed: $197.00 cash + 0.3450 share of Synopsys common stock per ANSYS share (fixed exchange ratio). Implied value: ~$390.19/share based on SNPS closing price of $559.96 on Dec. 21, 2023 (last undisturbed day); ~$367.57 based on SNPS price of $494.40 on Jan. 12, 2024 (day before announcement); ~$393.30 based on SNPS price of $568.99 on Apr. 9, 2024 | Merger Consideration section; Cover letter to stockholders |
| **Implied premium to undisturbed share price** | ~$390.19 per ANSYS share implied by SNPS price of $559.96 on Dec. 21, 2023 (last trading day before media speculation); explicit % premium NOT STATED in extracted text | Cover letter to stockholders |
| **Financial advisor to acquirer (Synopsys)** | NOT STATED in extracted portion | — |
| **Financial advisor to target (ANSYS)** | NOT STATED in extracted portion | — |
| **Legal advisor to target (ANSYS)** | Skadden, Arps, Slate, Meagher & Flom LLP (Mike Ringler, Esq. and Peter Jones, Esq., Palo Alto, CA) | Cover page, "With a copy to" section |
| **Legal advisor to acquirer (Synopsys)** | Cleary Gottlieb Steen & Hamilton LLP (Christopher R. Moore, Paul Shim, Helena Grannis, San Francisco, CA) | Cover page, "With a copy to" section |
| **Key conditions to closing (top 3)** | 1. Adoption of merger agreement by majority of ANSYS stockholders at special meeting. 2. Expiration or termination of HSR Act waiting period and all required foreign antitrust/regulatory clearances in specified jurisdictions. 3. No governmental injunction or legal requirement making the merger illegal in any specified jurisdiction; registration statement effective with no SEC stop order. | Conditions to the Completion of the Merger section |
| **Termination fee payable by target (ANSYS)** | NOT STATED in extracted portion | — |
| **Termination fee payable by acquirer (Synopsys)** | NOT STATED in extracted portion | — |

> **Notes:**
> - The document was truncated at 6,000 tokens; certain fields (EV, financial advisors, termination fees, precise closing date language) may appear in sections not included in the extract.
> - The exchange ratio is fixed but subject to a cap: if Synopsys shares to be issued would exceed **19.9999%** of Synopsys shares outstanding pre-close, the exchange ratio is reduced and the cash consideration is increased correspondingly.
> - Post-merger, ANSYS stockholders are expected to hold approximately **16.5%** of the combined company.

# Microsoft / Activision Blizzard M&A Deal Terms

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Target (legal entity)** | Activision Blizzard, Inc. | Cover Page; Proxy Summary, p. 1 |
| **Acquirer (legal entity)** | Microsoft Corporation (via wholly owned subsidiary Anchorage Merger Sub Inc.) | Cover Page; Proxy Summary, p. 1 |
| **Announcement date** | January 18, 2022 | Proxy Summary / Notice of Special Meeting ("merger agreement dated as of January 18, 2022") |
| **Closing date (or expected closing)** | NOT STATED (proxy dated March 21, 2022 references "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger" on p. 28, but no specific date is given in the excerpt) | Table of Contents, p. 28 |
| **Total enterprise value (EV)** | NOT STATED (no aggregate EV figure is quoted in the excerpted text) | — |
| **Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value)** | All-cash; **$95.00 per share** of Activision Blizzard common stock (par value $0.000001), without interest | Cover Letter (p. 1 of shareholder letter); Proxy Summary — Merger Consideration, p. 3 |
| **Implied premium to undisturbed share price** | **~45.3%** to closing price on January 14, 2022 (last trading day prior to announcement); **~50.3%** to 30-trading-day VWAP ended January 14, 2022 | Cover Letter, p. 1; Proxy Summary — Merger Consideration, p. 3 |
| **Financial advisor to acquirer** | NOT STATED (no acquirer financial advisor is named in the excerpted text) | — |
| **Financial advisor to target** | **Allen & Company LLC** | Table of Contents (Annex C — Opinion of Allen & Company LLC); Proxy Summary — Opinion of Activision Blizzard's Financial Advisor, p. 6 |
| **Legal advisor to target** | NOT STATED (no target legal counsel is identified in the excerpted text) | — |
| **Key conditions to closing (top 3)** | 1. Affirmative vote of holders of a majority of outstanding shares of Activision Blizzard common stock to adopt the merger agreement. 2. Receipt of required regulatory approvals (referenced under "Regulatory Approvals," pp. 9, 69–70). 3. No law or order prohibiting consummation of the merger (referenced under "Conditions to the Closing of the Merger," pp. 11, 89–90). | Proxy Summary — Conditions to the Closing of the Merger, pp. 11, 89–90; Notice of Special Meeting |
| **Termination fee payable by target** | NOT STATED in excerpted text (section titled "Termination Fee" referenced at pp. 13 and 92, but dollar amount not included in excerpt) | Table of Contents, pp. 13, 92 |
| **Termination fee payable by acquirer (reverse termination fee)** | NOT STATED in excerpted text (section titled "Reverse Termination Fee" referenced at pp. 13 and 93, but dollar amount not included in excerpt) | Table of Contents, pp. 13, 93 |

> **Note:** The document was truncated at 6,000 tokens; the specific dollar amounts for the termination fee and reverse termination fee, the acquirer's financial advisor, target legal counsel, the precise expected closing date, and the total enterprise value may appear in the full proxy statement but are not present in the provided excerpt.

# Juniper Networks / HPE Merger — Extracted Deal Terms

| Field | Value | Source |

| **Target (legal entity)** | Juniper Networks, Inc. (Delaware corporation) | Summary / Parties Involved in the Merger, p. 1 |

| **Announcement date** | January 9, 2024 (date of Merger Agreement) | Cover letter / Notice of Special Meeting, p. i; Merger Agreement date throughout |
| **Closing date (or expected closing)** | NOT STATED (Special Meeting scheduled April 2, 2024; proxy dated February 26, 2024 references "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger," p. 30, but specific closing date not stated in the excerpted text) | TOC "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger," p. 30 |
| **Total enterprise value (EV)** | NOT STATED (aggregate equity value not explicitly stated in the excerpted document) | — |
| **Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value)** | All cash; **$40.00 per share** of Juniper common stock, less applicable withholding taxes | "Merger Consideration" section, p. 3; also cover letter p. ii and Proposal 1, p. 79 |
| **Implied premium to undisturbed share price** | NOT STATED in the excerpted text (premium discussion referenced in "Recommendation of the Board of Directors and Reasons for the Merger," p. 50, but not quoted in the truncated excerpt) | — |
| **Financial advisor to acquirer (HPE)** | NOT STATED in the excerpted text | — |
| **Financial advisor to target (Juniper)** | **Goldman Sachs & Co. LLC** | TOC "Opinion of Goldman Sachs & Co.," p. 9 & p. 54; cover letter p. 9 |
| **Legal advisor to target (Juniper)** | NOT STATED in the excerpted text | — |
| **Key conditions to closing (top 3)** | (1) Adoption of the Merger Agreement by affirmative vote of holders of at least a majority of outstanding shares of Juniper common stock; (2) Regulatory approvals required for the Merger (antitrust / competition clearances referenced throughout); (3) Other customary closing conditions as set forth in the Merger Agreement | "Closing Conditions," Summary p. 6; "Conditions to the Closing of the Merger," Proposal 1, p. 92; "Regulatory Approvals Required for the Merger," pp. 6 & 75 |
| **Termination fee payable by target (Juniper)** | NOT STATED in the excerpted text (referenced under "Termination Fees," p. 94, but dollar amount not included in the truncated excerpt) | "Termination Fees," p. 94 |
| **Termination fee payable by acquirer (HPE)** | NOT STATED in the excerpted text (referenced under "Termination Fees," p. 94, but dollar amount not included in the truncated excerpt) | "Termination Fees," p. 94 |

> **Note:** The document was truncated to ~6,000 tokens. Several values (EV, premium, legal advisors, specific termination fee amounts) appear in sections of the proxy that were cut off. The table accurately reflects only what was explicitly stated in the provided excerpt.

Here is the structured deal-terms table based on the proxy statement (DEFM14A) filed by Acacia Communications, Inc.:

| Field | Value | Source |
|---|---|---|
| **Target (legal entity)** | Acacia Communications, Inc. (Delaware corporation) | Cover page; Parties to the Merger, p. 1 |
| **Acquirer (legal entity)** | Cisco Systems, Inc. (Delaware corporation, reincorporated from California on January 25, 2021); acquiring through wholly owned subsidiary Amarone Acquisition Corp. | Parties to the Merger, p. 1–2 |
| **Announcement date** | Original merger agreement: July 9, 2019; Amended and Restated merger agreement: January 14, 2021 | Cover letter, February 8, 2021; p. 1 |
| **Closing date (or expected closing)** | NOT STATED (Special Meeting scheduled March 1, 2021; proxy references "Anticipated Date of Completion of the Merger," p. 35, but no specific closing date is stated in the truncated document) | Table of Contents, p. 35 |
| **Total enterprise value (EV)** | NOT STATED | — |
| **Equity consideration (cash / stock / mix; per-share value)** | All-cash; $115.00 per share of Company common stock, without interest, subject to required withholding tax | Cover letter, p. 1; Merger Consideration section, p. 107 |
| **Implied premium to undisturbed share price** | NOT STATED in the truncated document | — |
| **Financial advisor to acquirer** | NOT STATED in the truncated document | — |
| **Financial advisor to target** | Goldman Sachs (opinion attached as Annex B) | Table of Contents, Annex B; "Opinion of the Company's Financial Advisor," p. 68 |
| **Legal advisor to target** | NOT STATED explicitly in the truncated document | — |
| **Key conditions to closing (top 3)** | (1) Adoption of the Amended and Restated Merger Agreement by affirmative vote of holders of a majority of outstanding shares of Company common stock; (2) Regulatory approvals (referenced p. 104 and Conditions to the Merger, p. 127); (3) No material adverse effect / satisfaction of representations, warranties and covenants (Conditions to the Merger, p. 127) | "Conditions to the Merger," p. 127; "Vote Required," p. 32; "Regulatory Approvals," p. 104 |
| **Termination fee payable by target** | NOT STATED in the truncated document (referenced at "Termination Fee," p. 129, but amount not included in truncated text) | "Termination Fee," p. 129 |
| **Termination fee payable by acquirer** | NOT STATED in the truncated document (referenced at "Termination Fee," p. 129, but amount not included in truncated text) | "Termination Fee," p. 129 |

> **Note:** Several fields (closing date, EV, premium, acquirer financial advisor, target legal advisor, and termination fee amounts) are either not present in the truncated 6,000-token excerpt or are genuinely not stated in the document. The termination fee provisions are referenced on p. 129 of the proxy but the actual dollar amounts were not included in the portion of the document provided.
